items.title: Pornhub is unblocking UK users who verify their age with Apple
items.summary: Its parent company Aylo says age-verified iOS users in the UK will now be able to fully access the adult website.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: CMF Watch 3 Pro With Dual-Band GPS, Up to 13 Days Battery Life Launched in India: Price, Features
items.summary: CMF has launched the Watch 3 Pro smartwatch in India at Rs. 6,999. The wearable features a 1.43-inch AMOLED display, dual-band five-system GPS, and AI-powered running coaching....
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: CMF Watch 3 Pro smartwatch launched with AMOLED display
items.summary: CMF Watch 3 Pro can also monitor heart rate and sleep, stress tracking, guided breathing exercises, hydration and inactivity reminders and women’s health support
